added.0o3yg8: You must be 18 or older to connect as a guardian. Once connected, you'll be able to see your teen's activity and manage their settings. [Learn more]({link})

added.jcUN2F: Guardian connection links expire after 1 hour. Ask your teen to send you a new link, or scan the QR code in their Family Center.
